title: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
description: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.

title: Orchestra-o1: Omnimodal Agent Orchestration

title: WorkBench Revisited: Workplace Agents Two Years On
description:
arXiv:2606.13715v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: The best agent on WorkBench in March 2024, GPT-4, completed 43% of tasks and took an unintended harmful action, such as emailing the wrong person, on 26% of them. We re-visit the benchmark in June 2026 and find that the best agent to date, Claude Opus

title: TwinBI: An Agentic Digital Twin for Efficient Augmented Interactions with Business Intelligence Dashboards
description:
arXiv:2606.13731v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Business intelligence (BI) increasingly combines dashboard interaction with LLM-based assistance, but these two modes often fall out of sync during multi-step analysis. As users switch between direct dashboard manipulation and natural-language queries

title: MA-ProofBench: A Two-Tiered Evaluation of LLMs for Theorem Proving in Mathematical Analysis
description:
arXiv:2606.13782v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have made notable progress in automated theorem proving, yet existing formal benchmarks remain limited in both mathematical coverage and difficulty. Most are concentrated in areas that are easier to formalize, such as alge

title: Poker Arena: Multi-Axis Profiling of Strategic Reasoning and Memory in LLMs
description:

title: Analyze earnings and update your investment thesis with Codex
description:
See how the public equity investing plugin for Codex turns a company’s latest quarter into a post-earnings analysis.

title: From data to decisions: how LSEG is scaling trusted AI
description:
What happens when one of the world's leading financial markets infrastructure and data providers combines trusted market intelligence with AI?

title: Dammi 25 Minuti e Ti Renderò PERICOLOSAMENTE Produttivo con Codex
description:
Dammi 25 Minuti e Ti Renderò PERICOLOSAMENTE Produttivo con Codex , anche se non hai mai scritto una riga di codice.

Codex è cambiato radicalmente ad aprile 2026 con l'update "Codex for (almost) everything": non è più solo un agente di coding, è una workstation AI che esegue task sul tuo computer,
